title: HAProxy Load Balancing Algorithms
description:
## HAProxy Load Balancing Algorithms

HAProxy supports several load balancing algorithms for distributing traffic across backend pods. The algorithm is configured per-Ingress via an annotation.

Which annotation and value configures HAProxy to use the **least-connections** algorithm for an Ingress backend?
explanation: HAProxy Ingress uses the annotation prefix `haproxy.org/`. The `haproxy.org/load-balance` annotation selects the balancing algorithm. Valid values mirror HAProxy's native algorithms: `roundrobin` (default), `leastconn`, `source`, `uri`, `hdr`, and others. The `nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/` prefix belongs to NGINX Ingress and is ignored by HAProxy. `round_robin` and `least-connections` are not valid HAProxy annotation values.

hints.title: Viewing annotations on an Ingress
hints.body: Use kubectl describe to see all annotations on an existing Ingress, including HAProxy-specific ones.
